supersedes: New dated folder for 2026-07-21, two days after the final. Run 9 (the resolving pass) preserved in research/2026-07-20/, Run 8 in research/2026-07-19/, Runs 3-5 in research/2026-07-15/, Run 6 in research/2026-07-16/, Run 7 in research/2026-07-17/, all in git. This is the aftermath pass: discipline, succession, and the money thread moved; no probability band did.

outcomes.finalRecordUnchanged: Spain 1-0 Argentina AET (Torres 106'); all Run 9 result/awards/records facts stand. One correction: Paredes' post-whistle straight red was RESCINDED by FIFA (erased from the record; no disciplinary measure was actually imposed on the night).

aftermath.brawlCase: FORMAL as of Jul 20: FIFA appointed a Disciplinary and Ethics Prosecutor to investigate post-match breaches. Named in coverage: Paredes (throat-grab on Eric Garcia, shoved Gavi), Molina (jab at Rodri), assistant coach Roberto Ayala (struck Dani Olmo). Possible suspensions and/or fines for players, staff, and the AFA. Prosecutor's report pending, no date.
aftermath.paredesRed: Rescinded/erased. Any sanction flows from the retrospective inquiry, not the card.
aftermath.enzoBan: Enzo Fernandez's final red CARRIES OVER to Argentina's next official match under FIFA World Cup regulations (suspension unserved at the tournament).
aftermath.malvinasRuling: STILL NOT ISSUED as of Jul 21. 2014 precedent (CHF 30,000) was published after that tournament ended, so post-final timing is consistent. Pending; benchmark unchanged.
aftermath.squadReturn: Squad landed Ezeiza Jul 20 (Aerolineas charter); crowd turned out despite the loss; protocol reception, no celebration; Tapia, Scaloni, Otamendi first off. Messi and De Paul stayed in the US.
aftermath.scaloni: Contract to December 2026. Post-final: 'hasta diciembre sigo y despues seguramente corte' - will see it out, then probably step away; still has to talk to the AFA president. (Ambito)
aftermath.messi: 39; NO announcement from him or the AFA. TyC Sports (Gaston Edul) reported the final was not his last international match. 'The Last Tango' boots + pre-final farewell letter read as a World Cup goodbye, not (yet) the shirt. Question recorded as open.

moneyThread.tapiaReturn: CLOSED open item: Tapia returned Jul 20 with the squad, as required by judge Diego Amarante's travel authorization (obligation to be back before Jul 21).
moneyThread.domesticProcessing: Tapia procesado (no preventive detention) in the ARCA withholdings case: ~AR$20,000M (~US$13M; earlier reported as ~US$12.7M) in allegedly withheld taxes and pension contributions. Toviggino and other officials also processed; multimillion asset embargoes.
moneyThread.casacionReset: The separate 'mansion' laundering thread moved BACKWARD: Camara Federal de Casacion (Barroetavena, Borinsky) annulled the ruling fixing the case with judge Gonzalez Charvay (Zarate-Campana); venue to be re-decided between San Martin and Comodoro Py. El Espanol: the FBI advances while the Argentine case regresses.
moneyThread.usInquiry: Still preliminary; no charges; no formal imputation of Tapia; FBI declines comment. New reported detail (Infobae): >US$13.5M through PNC alone in under a year, inside the >$300M total. TourProdEnter principals named by Infobae; site keeps roles-not-names.
moneyThread.aug12Hearing: Still the next fixed domestic date as previously reported; not re-confirmed post-annulment, phrased carefully in site copy.

predictions.note: Forecasts resolved and graded in Run 9; models.ts and bayes.ts untouched this run.

H2_chargeable_conduct.note: changeMind (subpoena/indictment/cooperating witness) still unmet. Domestic procesamiento detail thickens the existing 'real heat' forPoint but is not US-side movement; Casacion reset is procedural, not exculpatory. No band edit.

carriedForwardFromRun9: All Run 1-9 verified facts stand: the full result record (Spain 1-0 ARG AET, Torres 106', Enzo red 90+3' VAR-upheld, no ARG shot on target in regulation, attendance 80,663, Vincic/Dankert crew); awards sweep (Rodri Golden Ball, Messi Silver, Mbappe Golden Boot 10, Simon Glove, Cubarsi young player); Spain records (men's+women's double, one goal conceded, 37 unbeaten); Messi coda (second to appear in three finals after Cafu, first to start all three); forecast grading (favorite won - hit; extra-time tail - hit; Faghani tip - miss; 'no major controversy' - partial); H1 narrowed 2-6% and H4 strengthened 35-55% on the final's clean disconfirmation; prediction-market records (Kalshi >$1.27B contract, Polymarket >$4B); the money-thread corpus (five banks, TourProdEnter ~$260M/~$57M, Miami Herald ~$90M, Tofoni testimony, three named prosecutors, no US charges).
newSinceRun9: BRAWL CASE FORMAL: FIFA appointed a Disciplinary and Ethics Prosecutor (Jul 20) over the post-final scenes; Paredes, Molina and assistant coach Ayala named in coverage; suspensions/fines possible for players, staff and the AFA. Source yahoo-red-rescinded (+ World Soccer Talk for the FIFA statement).

PAREDES RED RESCINDED: FIFA erased the post-whistle straight red from the record, clarifying no disciplinary measure had been imposed on the night; sanctions, if any, come from the retrospective inquiry. Corrects Run 9's 'straight red' record; bracket.ts note and timeline final-brawl updated.
ENZO BAN CARRIES: the final red transfers to Argentina's next official match under FIFA World Cup regulations.

SQUAD RETURN + SUCCESSION: Ezeiza landing Jul 20 with a crowd despite the loss; Messi and De Paul stayed in the US. Scaloni: 'hasta diciembre sigo y despues seguramente corte' (contract to Dec 2026). Messi announced nothing; TyC reported the final was not his last international match. New timeline node squad-returns (order 21).

TAPIA'S COURT-ORDERED RETURN: flew home with the squad as judge Diego Amarante's travel bond required (back before Jul 21) - closes the Run 8/9 open item. Infobae 'three storm fronts': domestic procesamiento (~AR$20,000M withholdings, embargoes, Toviggino too), the still-preliminary US inquiry (new PNC >US$13.5M detail), and the resuming Milei feud. New timeline node tapia-returns (order 22).

CASACION RESET: the mansion-case jurisdiction ruling was annulled (Barroetavena/Borinsky); venue re-decided between San Martin and Comodoro Py; the FBI-advances-while-the-domestic-case-regresses contrast recorded. Source elespanol-casacion.
MALVINAS RULING still pending (Jul 21); 2014 precedent timing (post-tournament) makes this unsurprising.
NO post-tournament refereeing review or xG study published yet; H1/H3/H4 held.
